title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Americas — Q2 2026
summary: Twenty-four Americas markets are operationalizing AML/CFT frameworks as U.S. federal agencies finalize GENIUS Act stablecoin supervision and fundamental BSA reform while states race to establish competing crypto licensing regimes. The U.S. accounts for 16 of 28 regional events, with FinCEN's June 9 comment deadline on BSA/AML program reform representing the most significant compliance infrastructure overhaul since the Bank Secrecy Act's inception.
